examples:
Command Example
#
!fireeye-nx-get-events duration=48_hours end_time=2020-08-10T06:31:00
Context Example
#
{
"FireEyeNX": {
"Event": [

outputs.description: The ID of the event. FireEyeNX.Event.Occurred The date and time when the event occurred.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.EventId

outputs.description: The IP address of the victim. FireEyeNX.Event.SrcPort The port number of the victim.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.SrcIp

outputs.description: The IP address of the attacker. FireEyeNX.Event.DstPort The port number of the attacker.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.DstIp

outputs.description: The severity level of the event. FireEyeNX.Event.SignatureRev The signature revision number of the event.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.Severity

outputs.description: The signature identity number of the event. FireEyeNX.Event.SignatureMatchCnt The signature match count number of the event.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.SignatureIden

outputs.description: The virtual LAN (VLAN) of the event. FireEyeNX.Event.VmVerified Whether the event VM was verified.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.Vlan

outputs.description: The MAC address of the source machine. FireEyeNX.Event.DstMac The MAC address of the destination machine.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.SrcMac

outputs.description: The rule name for the event. FireEyeNX.Event.SensorId The sensor ID of the FireEye machine.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.RuleName

outputs.description: The CVE ID found in the event. FireEyeNX.Event.ActionTaken The IPS blocking action taken on the event.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.CveId

outputs.description: The attack mode mentioned in the event. FireEyeNX.Event.InterfaceId The interface ID of the event.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.AttackMode

outputs.description: The protocol used in the event. FireEyeNX.Event.IncidentId The incident ID of the event on FireEye.
outputs.name: FireEyeNX.Event.Protocol
